{
  "claims": [
    "California is home to nearly 155,000 stationed active duty service members with 70,000 spouses and more than 1.7 million veterans.",
    "Programs offering legal aid to veterans and active service duty members report that the largest area of unmet legal need statewide is housing.",
    "The second largest area of unmet legal need statewide for active duty military and veterans is family law.",
    "The California State Bar is required to coordinate civil legal services for active duty service members and their families who cannot afford legal services.",
